text.title: GitHub Actions — Caching and Artifacts Failure Modes
text.summary: 4 antipatterns from real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Cache always misses; CI 2x slower than expected.
antipattern.root-cause: Key includes branch name instead of lockfile hash.

antipattern.symptom: Build output randomly disappears between jobs.
antipattern.root-cause: Build artefact stored in cache, evicted by LRU.

antipattern.symptom: Docker build takes 8 minutes per run.

antipattern.fix: Set explicit retention_days per artifact category.
